module.name: Personal Safety

objectives.obj: After you have completed this CBT module you should:
- Know the importance of being familiar with safety procedures and your own duties connected to your position on board.
- Be aware of the most common hazards linked to the different working operations on board and know how to reduce the number of accidents.
- Be familiar with Protection and Environmental work and know where to find more information about this.

module.credits: SCRIPT Vibeke Nordahl, Seagull AS Randi Svanes, Seagull AS Pål Viken, Seagull AS TECHNICAL ADVISORS Magne Fjeldstad, Th. Klavenes Tor Hergot Bergesen d/y Einar Hardus, Seagull AS MULTIMEDIA DESIGNERS Krzysztof Krakowski, Polaris Terje Knutsen, Seagull AS ARTWORK Ivar Ravlo, Seagull AS Krzysztof Krakowski, Polaris RECORDING STUDIO NSI Lydprodukjson AS ENGLISH VOICE Mark Brown, NSI Lydprodukjson AS RUSSIAN VOICE Irina Dorfmann, NSI Lydprodukjson AS CHINESE VOICE Seafarer Services CHINESE TRANSLATION Juan Luo, Seafarer Services Acknowledgement, inputs given by: Th. Klaveness Shipping Company, Norway Bergesen d/y Shipping Company, Norway
module.disclaimer: This program is supplied as a training tool only and is to be used in support of other applicable material. Guidelines provided by competent authorities, shipping companies or equipment manufacturers are to be followed. Certain material in this program is drawn from controlled documents. These documents may have been updated since the production of this program and caution must be exercised accordingly.
